title: eurybia cunninghamii
intro: Eurybia cunninghamii, also known as Mountain Heather, is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of New Zealand. It has been traditionally used in Maori medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, attributed to the presence of polyphenols and flavonoids. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Eurybia cunninghamii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
